title: athyrium melanopodium
intro: Athyrium melanopodium, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family (Athyriaceae). It is native to China and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Athyrium melanopodium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine.
